intent: Fix stop-quality-gate runtime behavior so premature phase=done with final_confirmation=asked/required is auto-repaired to needs_user before asking the user.
fast_path_reason: Harness self-maintenance across shell hooks and docs with local deterministic verification.

evidence.functional: Simulated Stop hook with phase=done + final_confirmation=asked: hook output was empty, phase auto-repaired to needs_user, final_confirmation stayed asked
evidence.verdict: doctor and deterministic hook simulation passed; accepted remains user-controlled

assumptions: asked/required means the user has not accepted yet, so hook may only move phase back to needs_user and must not set accepted.

decision_summary: Updated stop-quality-gate to self-heal premature done+asked/required into needs_user so final confirmation prompts are shown normally, while accepted remains user-controlled.

iteration.pass_condition: Hook syntax, DispatchTicket validation, doctor, and git diff checks pass.
